root.sql: select sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no, sc_mem_m_application_form.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_application_form.apply_date, sc_mem_m_application_form.member_name, sc_mem_m_application_form.member_surname, sc_mem_m_application_form.sex, sc_mem_m_application_form.date_of_birth, sc_mem_m_application_form.age, sc_mem_m_application_form.salary_amount, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename, sc_mem_m_share_app.share_qty, sc_mem_m_share_app.recrieve_share, sc_mem_m_share_app.share_amount, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_application_type.appl_type_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_position.position_name , sc_mem_ucf_group_position.description , sc_mem_ucf_group_position.group_position , sc_mem_ucf_group_position.grooup_contract from sc_mem_m_application_form, sc_mem_m_share_app, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_mem_m_ucf_application_type, sc_mem_m_ucf_position , sc_mem_ucf_group_position where ( sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no = sc_mem_m_share_app.application_form_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_application_form.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_application_form.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_application_form.appl_type_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_application_type.appl_type_code ) --and (sc_mem_ucf_group_position.group_position = sc_mem_m_application_form.group_position) --and ( sc_mem_m_application_form.position_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_position.position_code ) and (sc_mem_m_application_form.mem_type = '01') /*WHERE*/ --and ( sc_mem_m_application_form.apply_date between '01/01/2019' and '18/09/2019' )
